REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION BROUGHT BY ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS BECAUSE SHE CANNOT STATE A COMPLETE CAUSE OF ACTION AS SHE HAD NO INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT PROPERTY AT THE TIME OF THE FORECLOSURE. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION BROUGHT BY PLAINTIFFS ISIDORA CERALDE AND ALMA PECAOCO. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: E. IN OPPOSITION PLAINTIFF DOES NOT DISPUTE THAT A "BORROWER" STATUS IS NECESSARY FOR STANDING AND DOES NOT CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT SHE HAS BEEN AFFORDED THIS STATUS AFTER THE FACT, I.E. LOSS MITIGATION OPTIONS IN THE CONTEXT OF BANKRUPTCY." (OPPOSITION 8:18 - 9:4). ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Partial Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raffi Kassabian, esq. (213-457-8118) of Reed Smith LLP for Defendants/Moving party.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, and HSBC BANK USA, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Partial Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Defendant presents evidence that Plaintiff is not a party to the operative Notice and Deed of Trust, i.e. is not the borrower. In opposition Plaintiff does not dispute that a "borrower" status is necessary for standing and does not cite any authority for the proposition that she has been afforded this status after the fact, i.e. loss mitigation options in the context of bankruptcy." (Opposition 8:18 - 9:4). Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Continued To Aug-15-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Le T. Duong of Reed Smith LLP (415.659.4804) for defendants and moving parties; Paul A. Silver (510.701.0171) for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. The Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to all causes of action brought by Estrella Reyes De Jesus because she cannot state a complete cause of action as she had no interest in the subject property at the time of the foreclosure. The Demurrer is OVERRULED as to all causes of action brought by Plaintiffs Isidora Ceralde and Alma Pecaoco. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/GLW)
